script: for s in aixa ashley afrah axel cameron david emily-claude gabriel heather jesus-reyes jose lia neil neil-claude rosi stephanie-claude zahid; do sudo systemctl restart ${s}-responder.service; done; sleep 4; for s in aixa ashley afrah axel cameron david emily-claude gabriel heather jesus-reyes jose lia neil neil-claude rosi stephanie-claude zahid alejandro; do echo "${s}: $(systemctl is-active ${s}-responder.service)"; done
